rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proof `rfl`) causes simp to unfold `includeRight` before the four characteristic simp lemmas can match, making them dead in typical `simp` calls — a real and material API-design flaw confirmed against lines 133–137 and the downstream `@[simp]` lemmas in the diff. Review 1 misses this entirely.
